headline: OG&E to Host Bidgely EmPOWER AI 2026 Annual Conference in New York City
summary: LOS ALTOS, Calif., April 23, 2026--Bidgely's premier energy intelligence conference, EmPOWER AI, will be held May 12-14 in New York City to unite utility leaders, energy researchers and technology experts around artificial intelligence (AI) in the energy sector. Hosted by OG&E with sessions led by Alabama Power, Eversource, NV Energy, PSEG Long Island, Xcel Energy and more, EmPOWER AI 2026 will highlight how utilities are moving beyond AI experimentation toward enterprise-wide scalability.

content.title: OG&E to Host Bidgely EmPOWER AI 2026 Annual Conference in New York City

thumbnail.caption: This year's EmPOWER AI conference will demonstrate how utilities move from AI experimentation to enterprise-wide scalability with Bidgely's UtilityAI.
